text.title: Substack-to-Product Funnel Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the path from preconditions to a valid spec artefact.

example.title: Happy-path spec artefact
example.description: Solo authors on Substack who treat the paid tier as a tip jar and miss the recommendation-network + cross-post mechanics that compound to a hard product. An operator with all prerequisites in place runs the methodology; outcome is a validated spec matching the output contract.
example.code: { "operator": "ruslan@faion.net", "publication_url": "<publication_url-value>", "paid_tier": "{ ... }", "recommendation_partners": "[/* see template — populated per Prerequisites */]", "cross_post_cadence": "{ ... }", "welcome_sequence": "[/* see template — populated per Prerequisites */]", "hard_product_url": "<hard_product_url-value>", "hard_product_cta_text": "<hard_product_cta_text-value>", "kpi_set": "{ ... }", "version": "1.1.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }
example.trace: Inputs satisfied → decision-tree run branch fires → rule r1-paid-tier-is-product drives the artefact shape → self-check PASS → validator exit 0 → returned to caller.
